name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: While Congress waits, the American people are hurting
body:
Dear Activist,

I've had enough of watching the American people suffer thanks to Donald Trump's dangerous and erratic economic policies. I know you have, too.

He's rewarded his wealthy donors with a massive tax cut -- leaving working families struggling -- and stripped healthcare coverage from 13 million people. If his trade war happens, it'll tear a hole in the wallets of Americans from all walks of life.

In far too many ways, we're headed in the wrong direction. Right now, it's time to stop going downhill and start climbing again: That's why we need to impeach this president.

[**Trump 's threatening the middle class, and we need to take action. Add your name to the movement of Americans coming together to demand Congress impeach Donald Trump.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/ddhWK/6/Nr/r5cs/61xe0K/sajWr4KZS9/P/P) [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/ddhWK/s/NY/r5cs/61xe0K/sySyVHkUtB/P/P) Look, we know Trump has already committed eight impeachable offenses so far. **Enough is enough: We need to remove this dangerous president from office.**

We don't know what he'll do next: Provoke North Korea further? Double down on his obstruction of justice? Further erode our civil liberties?

But here's what I do know: While Congress waits to act, the American people are hurting -- and that's not right.

That's why we need to impeach this president. We must come together and demand Congress act immediately.

[**Add your name today to join our movement for impeachment. Our future depends on it.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/ddhWK/v/Ne/r5cs/61xe0K/sb2k2U3beS/P/P) [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/ddhWK/z/N3/r5cs/61xe0K/zuJMZIu6OS/P/P) Thanks for being a part of this,

Tom Steyer
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjYyLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjEwMzcxMzg4)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm asking you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Before midnight tonight, I'm asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee.
---
**[Before midnight tonight, I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution to the Democratic National Committee, Derek.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b1dc/2634127873/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018-ew?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Before+midnight+tonight+Im+asking+you+to&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew")**

It's more important than ever before that Democrats compete for every vote, in every race, at every level, in every state, in every election. That's what the new DNC is focused on, and I believe in what they're doing. I'm not just saying that -- I donated to the DNC and all 50 state parties myself earlier this year!

**Tonight is a big fundraising deadline, and how much the party is able to raise before then will determine the level of investment we're able to make in our candidates and campaigns. If you're able, please consider making a $3 donation before midnight.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b195/2634127873/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018-ew?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew")

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b19e/2634127873/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018-ew?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b19f/2634127873/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018-ew?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b19c/2634127873/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018-ew?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew")
** Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b19d/2634127873/VEsFBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b19a/2634127873/VEsFBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229fb/4067b0a/5fb86e546/7e45b198/2634127873/VEsFAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ew_ew&source=em_20180430_ew_ew&refcode=em_20180430_ew_ew"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump proclaims Small Business Week
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97b1265e0be1dc71d1194f66501c4c47529d359db0ee436188dd8d047f7070c027f28130723558f29164f39c96a3ae714c4c9e256fd90f79

The White House - April 30, 2018

Driving the Day

President Donald J. Trump will hold meetings today with Nigerian President Muhammadu Buhari at the White House. President Buhari’s visit comes after President Trump hosted German Chancellor Angela Merkel and French President Emmanuel Macron last week.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97b1265e0be1dc716d94e0b41b9543a4c18cc01ec53b7ba57adcbc4bba56066fbebdc3b0e6863f7bc1332ce85872131dbacafec0a0e7b58c
Watch live at 1:30 p.m. ET.

President Trump proclaims Small Business Week

Today marks the beginning of Small Business Week. The U.S. Small Business Administration under Administrator Linda McMahon has been committed to expanding opportunity for entrepreneurs and job creators across the country. In addition to other events this week, SBA is hosting a
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97b1265e0be1dc712a637daab3cb77be94fdba7600e04c1ea79b7c857b30077d057005da9c279c8f47e92b4c43b28140cb1102f38873471b
3-day virtual conference beginning tomorrow.

“Small businesses are at the heart of our Nation,” President Trump writes in his Proclamation. “Our country’s 30 million small businesses employ nearly 58 million Americans — 48 percent of the labor force. Each year, small businesses create two-out-of-three net new, private-sector jobs in the United States.”

The Administration’s economic program reflects that fact. In addition to ongoing regulatory rollback across the Federal government, the United States now operates “under a globally competitive tax system for the first time in decades,” according to Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97b1265e0be1dc71164ce3119dbdbaf84502325fc6f028138ec7003a917dc02b361988ca953cd3d698bf0eb5a1fd328551a8373f4c67db10
Learn more about Small Business Week 2018.

Out today:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97b1265e0be1dc7103a863175fdcc9056477516f4a0b25a05ee70ac8d5849654a532887041755b0226670451cad85069f171cbd7131dda7a
Secretary Ross on tax reform’s results for U.S. workers and businesses.

What they’re saying: Secretary Pompeo on the job

Last week, the Senate confirmed former CIA Director Mike Pompeo as Secretary of State in a bipartisan vote. On Friday, the day after his confirmation, he took his first overseas trip as Secretary to Belgium to meet with NATO leaders.

Officials from across the political spectrum praise Pompeo’s record. “Mike Pompeo is one of the most outstanding nominees we could have for Secretary of State,” Senate Foreign Relations Committee Chairman Bob Corker (R-TN) says. “In his role at the CIA, Mr. Pompeo has demonstrated the ability to be an effective manager and operator on the world stage,” Sen. Doug Jones (D-AL) adds.

President Trump urges the Senate to move quickly on other key nominations. Among the most important is Secretary Pompeo’s successor as CIA Director. Gina Haspel, the President’s nominee, has spent 33 years of her life serving America in dangerous posts and foreign capitals around the globe. Before becoming CIA Deputy Director last year, she had served seven field tours and held three leadership positions at the CIA.

clean_body: 1600 Daily The White House - April 30, 2018 Driving the Day President Donald J. Trump will hold meetings today with Nigerian President Muhammadu Buhari at the White House. President Buhari’s visit comes after President Trump hosted German Chancellor Angela Merkel and French President Emmanuel Macron last week. Watch live at 1:30 p.m. ET. President Trump proclaims Small Business Week Today marks the beginning of Small Business Week. The U.S. Small Business Administration under Administrator Linda McMahon has been committed to expanding opportunity for entrepreneurs and job creators across the country. In addition to other events this week, SBA is hosting a 3-day virtual conference beginning tomorrow. “Small businesses are at the heart of our Nation,” President Trump writes in his Proclamation. “Our country’s 30 million small businesses employ nearly 58 million Americans — 48 percent of the labor force. Each year, small businesses create two-out-of-three net new, private-sector jobs in the United States.” The Administration’s economic program reflects that fact. In addition to ongoing regulatory rollback across the Federal government, the United States now operates “under a globally competitive tax system for the first time in decades,” according to Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross. Learn more about Small Business Week 2018. Out today: Secretary Ross on tax reform’s results for U.S. workers and businesses. What they’re saying: Secretary Pompeo on the job Last week, the Senate confirmed former CIA Director Mike Pompeo as Secretary of State in a bipartisan vote. On Friday, the day after his confirmation, he took his first overseas trip as Secretary to Belgium to meet with NATO leaders. Officials from across the political spectrum praise Pompeo’s record. “Mike Pompeo is one of the most outstanding nominees we could have for Secretary of State,” Senate Foreign Relations Committee Chairman Bob Corker (R-TN) says. “In his role at the CIA, Mr. Pompeo has demonstrated the ability to be an effective manager and operator on the world stage,” Sen. Doug Jones (D-AL) adds. President Trump urges the Senate to move quickly on other key nominations. Among the most important is Secretary Pompeo’s successor as CIA Director. Gina Haspel, the President’s nominee, has spent 33 years of her life serving America in dangerous posts and foreign capitals around the globe. Before becoming CIA Deputy Director last year, she had served seven field tours and held three leadership positions at the CIA. | Friends and Neighbors -- Just wanted to make sure you saw Jeremy's email from a couple of days ago. Because of generous supporters like you, we are very close to reaching our April goal! Every dollar helps us to reach voters from the Panhandle to the Everglades - and gets us closer to sending Jeremy to the cabinet, to fight for everyday Floridians and to build an innovation centered economy as our next CFO. But we're not there yet. Can you help us reach our goal by making a contribution by midnight?: [https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-4637207957566125568](https://act.myngp.com/el/U-t7LAfCioFU_F_mdpbMKXsnuLBOiK64-p8zvjlWrTY=/XfddWEssFOSDjIDLlXwh6xRqvpUjLOB9D2FF42GlC2k=) Thank you for all you do, Anthony Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message ---------- [](https://act.myngp.com/el/U-t7LAfCioFU_F_mdpbMKXsnuLBOiK64-p8zvjlWrTY=/Rrg3QO-6CnoaUn95yOpdtsb9yxCo9xoHugTykwEuegI=) Friends and Neighbors -- Florida's Chief Financial Officer (CFO) may not make the news all that often - but they always have a lot on their plate! From overseeing state accounting functions to serving on the state Clemency Board and as a trustee to the Retirement System, the CFO plays a pivotal role in helping the cabinet and state government run efficiently and in making sure your tax dollars are being spent in the way you were promised they would be. All of these aspects of the job are very important for our state - but I happen to believe that the CFO role has the potential to be even bigger than that. I believe that the Chief Financial Officer can also be - if I may - the Chief Innovation Officer. As your next CFO, I would bring a wealth of innovative business and leadership experience to the cabinet. [Help Jeremy Get to the Cabinet. Chip in $3.](https://act.myngp.com/el/U-t7LAfCioFU_F_mdpbMKXsnuLBOiK64-p8zvjlWrTY=/XfddWEssFOSDjIDLlXwh6xRqvpUjLOB9D2FF42GlC2k=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) I would work to promote and implement forward thinking policies that would aim to both keep and create tech sector and other innovative centered jobs right here in the Sunshine State, fostering an innovation economy, to set a national standard, ready made for the 21st century. But I have to get to Tallahassee first. **And I can 't get there without your help**. We have a key End of Month fundraising deadline coming up, in just a few days, one that will be essential in helping us reach the voters we need to bring this thing home. body:
[ ](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTIwLTRhMTRhMTAzOGZkNjRhOWNiYzRjYjdmNTUyMDNhZTM4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vbnVuZXMvZG9uYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPUFFJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNDMwX0RldmluX0FFX0dPUDM&K=QT1Q4ljsLxx9V56G-t1Mpg) Dear Friend, In just a few hours, my campaign hits another fundraising deadline.
Another month in the books as we continue to march on towards Election Day - **which will be here in less than 200 days. **
You've heard the term "blue wave" all over the biased media and social channels - extreme liberals want you to believe that it's really happening.
**In reality, conservatives are uniquely placed to solidify and fortify our majority in Congress thanks to the hard work of our conservative leaders and our fortitude in the face of the slanderous attacks coming from the far left.** I reject the notion that conservatives will roll over and allow extreme liberals to take the majority in Congress this year. I know that my colleagues and I - as well as conservative patriots across the country - are ready to stand firm in support of our values and ideals. **[In order to stand and fight, we need you with us.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTIwLTRhMTRhMTAzOGZkNjRhOWNiYzRjYjdmNTUyMDNhZTM4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vbnVuZXMvZG9uYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPUFFJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNDMwX0RldmluX0FFX0dPUDM&K=J2b0l3g3xd_YGHES4DPvJw)** **You are essential to the conservative movement, Friend. Every donation helps our outreach: making phone calls, visiting voters, purchasing air time for ads on TV and radio, and digital ad buys to reach people online.
Taking on the liberal establishment and standing strong for our values is a huge undertaking, but _**I believe in our cause and I am willing to give my all for our community.**_
**[Are you with me? Please consider contributing today as we continue to fight and win.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTIwLTRhMTRhMTAzOGZkNjRhOWNiYzRjYjdmNTUyMDNhZTM4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vbnVuZXMvZG9uYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPUFFJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNDMwX0RldmluX0FFX0dPUDM&K=dfQVwO1zGffHKII06XTQFg)** This supposed "blue wave" will crumble to dust in the face of stalwart conservatives like you and me, Friend

name: Tom Perez
subject: You haven't donated to elect Democrats this year → Can you contribute before tonight's deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
The only way we'll be able to get our country back on track is if Democrats take back Congress this year -- it's really that simple.
---
The only way we'll be able to get our country back on track is if Democrats take back Congress this year -- it's really that simple. What we raise before tonight's critical deadline will decide wins and losses in November.

**Contribute $3 before tonight's deadline to show you're ready to take back Congress.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be73/4235184646/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd")

[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be71/4235184646/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be7e/4235184646/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be7f/4235184646/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be7c/4235184646/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd")
** If there's one thing I know for sure, it's that Democrats can compete anywhere we organize. But that's only possible if we work together -- starting with tonight's deadline.

Thanks for your support,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- We've already reached our grassroots fundraising goal of 70,000 individual donations for April. Now we've set a larger goal of 75,000 donations -- **[before midnight tonight, make a $3 donation and together we'll hit our new goal.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be7d/4235184646/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+before+midnight+tonight+make+a+if+consin&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd")**

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be7a/4235184646/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be7b/4235184646/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be78/4235184646/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522808/4067b0a/5fa5d8de7/7e45be79/4235184646/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_tp_nd&source=em_20180430_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180430_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team Kasich
subject: It's working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
Today is the last day of April, so you may receive a lot of
emails from campaigns asking you for money. We have a deadline
too but our ask is different.

Peter, today is the last day of
April, so you may receive a lot of emails from campaigns asking
you for money. We have a deadline too but our ask is different.

As you've seen, Gov. Kasich has
been a leading voice in America.

-A Voice of Reason-

-A Voice of Compassion-

-A Voice Driving Solutions-

Whether you're a Republican, a
Democrat or an Independent voter, our ask is the same. Support
this message to help save our country from the dark, divisive
path our elected leaders in Washington have lead us down.

This may sound like the normal
political talk that you hear endlessly from Washington, but Gov.
John Kasich's voice is making a larger and larger impact every
day.

It's measurable in so many ways,
including the amount of media coverage it's getting…the
number of grassroots contributions we're receiving from all over
the country, the number of people who sign up daily for more
updates and by the growing number of messages of support we hear
every day.

Just today, the Washington Post
featured a column about Gov. Kasich's message:

Washington Post: John Kasich
Diagnoses the GOP's Woes (read more)

In just the last few months, this
message has:

• Offered Americans an
alternative to the divisive rhetoric

• Brought Republicans and
Democrats together to push for common sense gun reforms that will
save lives

• Brought law enforcement
together with faith & community leaders (bipartisan) to tackle
the difficult challenges we face with police-community relations

• Brought together
Republicans, Democrats and Independents to offer a fair health
care fix for America

• Offered an experienced and
common sense message about our nation's out-of-control debt

• Championed redistricting
reform so our elected leaders in Washington will focus on a
message of unity and common sense rather than only talking to the
extremes in both parties

The list goes on

This is worth supporting

Now is your chance

Thank you for all that you're
doing.

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWUoVF9VDN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWUoVF9VDN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-51030715255-echo3-1A29AB73E9DA980BD4B1D5004881458E@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Dana Bye
subject: Last chance in April!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

As April comes to a close, I want to reach out and send my sincere thanks for your support of this campaign -- and for the many ways you've shown how much you care about the future of Virginia's 7th District.

You're the reason this campaign has been endorsed by EMILY's List, End Citizens United, and NARAL, and why forecasters like the Cook Political Report, Sabato's Crystal Ball, and CNN are paying closer and closer attention to Abigail and the 7th.

[**Let 's keep the momentum going.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xubsOcU-uD3zIBhZDT6ACtD02IZD7CysEOGXs0NjuCs=/vkl-H_M57B3iwd1546NuFHeN7hNeNI4-Eh22Iu5_jcM=?refcode=043018)

You can spread our message even further -- and send a powerful message to the people nationwide who are watching what's happening in our district -- by **[making a contribution today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/xubsOcU-uD3zIBhZDT6ACtD02IZD7CysEOGXs0NjuCs=/vkl-H_M57B3iwd1546NuFHeN7hNeNI4-Eh22Iu5_jcM=?refcode=043018)** We're just $1,347 away from our April goal, and time is of the essence. The more resources we have now, the stronger we'll be heading into May.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xubsOcU-uD3zIBhZDT6ACtD02IZD7CysEOGXs0NjuCs=/vkl-H_M57B3iwd1546NuFHeN7hNeNI4-Eh22Iu5_jcM=?refcode=043018)

I'm so grateful that engaged citizens like you are staying involved and demanding better representation in Washington. **Let 's keep moving:** toward better representation for the 7th, and toward a future that reflects the hopes and ambitions of the good people who live here.

Thank you, as always, for your support,

-Dana

_Campaign Manager_
_Abigail Spanberger for Congress_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xubsOcU-uD3zIBhZDT6ACtD02IZD7CysEOGXs0NjuCs=/S4Bt0lWZOSvRaFC5g2xe1I3IdbcivcdHtWcI2NPcoI4=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/xubsOcU-uD3zIBhZDT6ACtD02IZD7CysEOGXs0NjuCs=/2DlTCoyk0-GUNbLQsiwH6Gtp9v41KgNZWJfKKjjveKs=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/xubsOcU-uD3zIBhZDT6ACtD02IZD7CysEOGXs0NjuCs=/7KsxrYpWm3TaJXqG3zyX_XQe4s95cPHaVOwzxfhK61w=).

body:
Today is the final day to order your limited-edition car magnet. Donate $10 now and we'll put one in the mail for you:
---
I wanted to be sure you knew that today is the last day to order your limited-edition car magnet.

**Before tonight's midnight deadline, chip in $10 to get your car magnet -- we'll ship it to you for free.**

[](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522800/4067b0a/5f9ae4a36/7e45aa15/1638908941/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/car-magnets-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em_20180430_dnc_nd&source=em_20180430_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180430_dnc_nd")

name: Jason Yates
subject: This is the solution that will heal America
body:
| | Our nation is divided, but this isn’t the first time
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2018-national-day-of-repentance%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180430com01&n=1)
| Peter, Today is an important day. It dates back to 1863 when the United States Senate was witness to one of the darkest hours in American history - the Civil War. The South seemed to be winning and the nation seemed as if it would not prevail united, and so the Senate passed a resolution requesting President Abraham Lincoln appoint a national day of prayer and fasting. On March 30th, 1863 President Lincoln designated April 30th, 1863 a national day of prayer and humiliation – the day we now call the National Day of Repentance. The following July, the Union forces defeated the Confederate troops at Gettysburg and America began to chart a new course. Many might say the victory was because tens of thousands of people of faith were on their knees confessing repentance for the sins of slavery and racism in our nation. America is again in a dark hour. There is a spirit of division that has taken root in the heart of our nation. We are divided today just as we were during the Civil War but this time it’s not a division created by battle lines or troops. This time it’s a deep political division between red and blue. The quest for truth seems to have been replaced by a political battleground. What’s the solution to the division we now witness? Repentance. Just as it was the solution in 1863 it remains the solution for America today. The answer for our land to be healed and united is the repentance for our sins. The U.S. Senate of 1863 and President Lincoln didn’t come up with this idea, it’s outlined in 2 Chronicles 7:14 and repeated over and over again throughout scripture: repent and obey. I’ve heard the calls for repentance before and I would guess you have as well. But I must confess I don’t always actively take the time to repent. Today that must change. For the sake of healing in our nation and our communities filled with division – we must humble ourselves, seek God’s face and turn from our wicked ways. [Peter, I encourage you to please take some time today to read through our simple guide on repentance and spend time humbling yourself before the Lord.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2018-national-day-of-repentance%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180430com01&n=2) Healing for our nation will begin with us. This is our moment in history to humble ourselves just as people of faith did in 1863. **_President Lincoln_** _said, “And whereas, it is the duty of nations as well as of men to own their dependence upon the overruling power of God, to confess their sins and transgressions in humble sorrow yet with assured hope that genuine repentance will lead to mercy and pardon, and to recognize the sublime truth, announced in the Holy Scriptures and proven by all history: that those nations only are blessed whose God is Lord.”_ As Ravi Zacharias prayed, “We ask forgiveness for our sins and strength for the journey. We ask for peace in the land and a return to your truths for our lives. We need You more than ever.” [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2018-national-day-of-repentance%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180430com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180430com01&n=4)
---
* * *

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180430com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180430com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180430com01&n=8)

body:
With only 15 left to the election, time is of the essence so I will get right to the point. We need to raise $35,000 by [midnight tonight](https://act.myngp.com/el/d1kW4z_XFW27oFcSO0EvimLlO2cMxwD5qv1ev5gSNBA=/9puW-veG9288AE8EE9mVA9206v_GACpuGe1LXckM4tI= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-april-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180430_eom_fnd_clq_act_em5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180430_eom_fnd_clq_act_em5&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&email=vrongione@gmail.com&firstname=Vince&lastname=Rongione&city=Drexel Hill&state=PA&zip=19026&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_content=1+-+midnight") to fight back against these personal attacks. Our opponents say they aren't running a negative campaign but you all know how this works - how the whispers and smears get spread. As a proud first generation woman of color, I knew this was coming but, it certainly doesn't mean we won't fight back!

[__**Please contribute now to send the message loud and clear that we are not going to take this stuff laying down anymore!**__](https://act.myngp.com/el/d1kW4z_XFW27oFcSO0EvimLlO2cMxwD5qv1ev5gSNBA=/H2ass7ZZ-bI3uZwDJkhhd-LRKPzMJOcEcPilXFBHr-M=)

We have built a groundbreaking campaign together and now it is time to prove to Donald Trump and the whole world that Pennsylvania is ready for a bold progressive leader who will fight to ban assault weapons, stamp out workplace harassment, and never whither under the pressures of the special interests, the political bosses, or the personal attacks. Together, we are much too strong for all that.

[**_Please, stand with me now and contribute all that you can before our MIDNIGHT TONIGHT fundraising DEADLINE! _**](https://act.myngp.com/el/d1kW4z_XFW27oFcSO0EvimLlO2cMxwD5qv1ev5gSNBA=/H2ass7ZZ-bI3uZwDJkhhd-LRKPzMJOcEcPilXFBHr-M=)

Victory is within reach but, not without your support. Thank you in advance for standing with me,

**Nina**

name: Team Leah
subject: a little thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I’m not sure if you saw Kevin Nicholson on TV yesterday morning. But if you did, he told the Madison media that all of our hard work to turn.....

Friend, I’m not sure if you saw Kevin Nicholson on TV yesterday morning. But if you did, he told the Madison media that all of our hard work to turn Wisconsin around is just a **“little thing.”

And he added, “None of it resulted in anything.”

Is he serious? **Watch the clip [here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=wCYTLHu4hi9lvVOEUS7_0T0H8UmLRpqEXEskePpqLyb_vrdzHXrJqwzG2Ir_VAqeUDrBX09HIsAAP3auLzGg5i6rwxjJLdqZYb7ALy1hCAqysBBEczZhHPJv-UNW2IUSlOzM5wiqUCvCapVzfgB0UVYDQJnQp5YBhx829TY62rPE4k_bwJzoYYD_Wn45vMQMPUQ1sbH4qKKX0GNttfuGf9RGRB779cW_TM6ig2WsgzngxGKctmIU2sxYkWP9oqgop8W2Z9dlI68mzhYjTFFadF5zwEX3Q_bGwHEYX6g_bcxxGlXvtHIksuL6WNr1ZYCyfl0nnm5Ul9Dd_05WJxQjmG_f5n6i8XCPLAETlh53mFv3sii-cpAkr2259jdwGRD0flRU6peVcEsUBQAasVZcnQ%3D%3D).

With your help, Gov. Walker and Leah Vukmir worked together to bring Wisconsin to a record-low 2.9% unemployment.

We eliminated the state property tax and cut taxes by more than $8 BILLION.

We established the Right to Work and ensured that workers weren’t forced to pay union dues to groups they didn’t want to be in.

We passed four balanced budgets.

We defunded Planned Parenthood and banned abortions after 20 weeks.

We worked to lower Obamacare’s exploding health insurance premiums at the state level.

We upheld the 2nd Amendment by allowing concealed carry in Wisconsin.

We expanded educational opportunities for our kids through School Choice.

We worked to address the devastating heroin epidemic.

We held carjackers and other repeat violent offenders accountable.

But “none of it resulted in anything”?

Our next senator should know how important these victories are for our conservative principles — not discount them.

Leah has been there with you and Gov. Walker as we’ve made Wisconsin open for business and made it a great place to live. With the support conservative grassroots activists like you, Leah’s stood up to leadership and continually pushed to move Wisconsin in the right direction.

You can count on her to do the same thing in the U.S. Senate, as she’ll push to build the wall and crack down on illegal immigration, defend the precious unborn, and uphold our constitutional rights. She’s done it before, and she’ll do it again.

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=fydaUDOjAtieU8I9sErNYQOtfCaDkaGmOVm5A5UL-iy_23QDUCxY0X8nhv1HHWSvagljbHK9tWiuC_YJ9L0oefLx-7Ww7hKmIVyfzjGl-NabgJMICynSiouxU6s9KV0HC_j_O_kcLf6v12noqHhKmfFdFSyr3Br08MS42dplIiAaVl1hSQn3Llwlz-pZtMIv3tCWih3aTDW7y_vA8x5wcitBZI3YDKXXF8KC7MIujS8G1m0Kh9v7_GFKpxUFcvtiQKQfgFogMp7ZrBk-pq4XRrqhzJT7UQZL8CQKn6gb7mZNkteqxHlbli95Dt9lXsoJfiZp8Cq2pMUI2Vhtrf8WZBYKguNGs8fstoWH7AGGFi2Tht5Uz7e_ZOoYDCIdIWEV) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=fydaUDOjAtieU8I9sErNYQOtfCaDkaGmOVm5A5UL-ixyCNZxG8s1gqYlFIiZoJjyQDoBoIdzi25xGJvEVbCL8aQccecqKzvGi1C1qgNVaWShFjyzJSAi6rWROWmVgtlX2lwy0oy9fqvxME8ifC0ghgYIWh63cRcYpKXmf8jRqCJbd26FtUSp5CTepG_75PbHD1192TMscK2AnPkDTHEVpu4pxWuNd4NnLNmLYF51fOtv14F99KZ-oAV3ArtuagEbfcnDZnyXMtYYotcU56fuaWIuB7jRxV5kcz9m1eiM4fvnQDTgpb4xnFfk55XbW1fZS-BvPDaKIEaYeGQFIiDIDT5pZo1EVkxKwKHvrr0W_pKZYX_IxYVd8bHhXAhvLw0f) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=fydaUDOjAtieU8I9sErNYW9lMqdElVBJfNZ2dXRHqGM0DJgjFumlyPUL6y6xioBCNMiadGVJmEARDWWGCMLjAJUBYdQxwrOEU2lI2x9AvLaYn2vhZ4OOERuocUOpKRccI4E-O4k3GjRiq3_DhAASS3YrGmGIce6iPIRO_qpCg2ucA2cKLI6fACe2L2zPNdiGsysDWeHe9xq4kl4iccCbpa3fKXfEp9tAetAVeF9mCpPH5FrIrBgjcxv29lzAWE93_-Pzw7aq7xo0LCsqL2sdqQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=fydaUDOjAtieU8I9sErNYWWW3ESDjUTdCeCyzGCX_u2k1MyRDklDafR2_KXc4K5qLPoOrSzg6tXJ2t-tyys_tUN6GTaVtLogONgBQtQcdixSDdbAytaV9oGcLNtFz1EDXj07TEaLhFWmHz3CQ9efHy4b-Qfox6fZabmmA1-pDtnXmYUSmYPs1SAk5ehLpgQ2_0Kmn88IMe4QK3f9NHfQKYENo9ANWoiTZSdllCQxuJGrCUOZR2tkotalIkPU_hYa-dze7e-Adk709dEGNuF0vA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=fydaUDOjAtieU8I9sErNYf1v7_Qe0dlOrFQIAm0_I2dd1upxeZ-FB7_HygDYj9xnTS6k3uBsqOSSwXErbSQ1V1E2uL_TpbcJo-HjL4-OdCXhArSdbqXns_18oENv5MdFuqrt8YmmLOdWm765joizXCUAa9sEzw56da0JGyY_z9nABhE5eEIq649LpmWiqTZLy7EZcFi3-21AksHq-btLDr97UlNsdDXLt_FyKaAtkVwnAWcOE6WskH4U2udIb92h2CunlI-qcrR0j0-Nrouj9Q%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=fydaUDOjAtieU8I9sErNYQOtfCaDkaGmOVm5A5UL-iwFdl_9gDgwd_TNoFicQa0_LjxQIg4AMdwZENy45GSl-cAb983MoexRlh_OxX2VMiFBMUYfDlLgYTlR0qYl_bBzGOaYVmBDZqbgBQG1Y-Ct4r1eVos_7nTlbffoGv0bM-0eHNnoafHidoRyshgexCg5iDLpcDN3EwX_PeDsBH4q7Uh9BC8UWhU9KqN3X1mWINU8bPwEOM9LaE5CmVzosvsiNsfhl4aBvRJmaUgsyO1379RHbZwmCk3X-z5m06tRmGz88s_qo6vLNYDeBAmMFB9vEYjfnOuoaV7duSkcS0FVz-W3JYBLcCZ4Sy4_TuXS-o9KHkgNqFYMs1e5fQ5ZqaxFnrNCLEOBx1P6uUUYDnna-g%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=wCYTLHu4hi9lvVOEUS7_0bs7tnr2mkgpVrQJXG9-E9XyR-mnAOyWqrshSAky4UjoCJURMjkLiTkZyyWQO8nIUawRAnGjRA70LUkhkJaeIzuUKYAv2bMndYK_JoqyYJFadYm7q0Q3OvoO9XkETNGLeQBOHa-dmZj1S6xfqkBCkECjzdyQz2nEphS-FxLYgTclefrWRUF7jxPLdhGWACWFdTldW7dO95rTgDlOqRwYOlcUJxI2DQUcuVb--o7PHS_b) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aa70948872dd47889bdb1992f8fa5d99&_e=wCYTLHu4hi9lvVOEUS7_0bs7tnr2mkgpVrQJXG9-E9XyR-mnAOyWqrshSAky4UjoCJURMjkLiTkZyyWQO8nIUawRAnGjRA70LUkhkJaeIzuUKYAv2bMndYK_JoqyYJFadYm7q0Q3OvoO9XkETNGLeQBOHa-dmZj1S6xfqkBCkECjzdyQz2nEphS-FxLYgTclefrWRUF7jxPLdhGWACWFdTldW7dO95rTgDlOqRwYOlcUJxI2DQUcuVb--o7PHS_b) to unsubscribe. clean_body: I’m not sure if you saw Kevin Nicholson on TV yesterday morning. But if you did, he told the Madison media that all of our hard work to turn..... Friend, I’m not sure if you saw Kevin Nicholson on TV yesterday morning. But if you did, he told the Madison media that all of our hard work to turn Wisconsin around is just a “little thing.” And he added, “None of it resulted in anything.” Is he serious? Watch the clip . With your help, Gov. Walker and Leah Vukmir worked together to bring Wisconsin to a record-low 2.9% unemployment. We eliminated the state property tax and cut taxes by more than $8 BILLION. We established the Right to Work and ensured that workers weren’t forced to pay union dues to groups they didn’t want to be in. We passed four balanced budgets. We defunded Planned Parenthood and banned abortions after 20 weeks. We worked to lower Obamacare’s exploding health insurance premiums at the state level. We upheld the 2nd Amendment by allowing concealed carry in Wisconsin. We expanded educational opportunities for our kids through School Choice. We worked to address the devastating heroin epidemic. We held carjackers and other repeat violent offenders accountable. But “none of it resulted in anything”? Our next senator should know how important these victories are for our conservative principles — not discount them. Leah has been there with you and Gov. Walker as we’ve made Wisconsin open for business and made it a great place to live. With the support conservative grassroots activists like you, Leah’s stood up to leadership and continually pushed to move Wisconsin in the right direction. You can count on her to do the same thing in the U.S. Senate, as she’ll push to build the wall and crack down on illegal immigration, defend the precious unborn, and uphold our constitutional rights. She’s done it before, and she’ll do it again. Team Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I can't do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Team, We can take nothing for granted this year...nothing. At least one of my Republican opponents is raising a decent amount money - in fact, she's raised more than all the other challengers put together. The only way we can counter that is with a grassroots push of our own. You know what that means -- Monday or not, we need to get to work. | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc3/622b7b5b/1a674e2a/307b8770/2494227572/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180429?refcode=dwse180429_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
I've been through challenging elections before. I've heard "you shouldn't run" or "you can't win" or "it's not your turn." You know what I did? I ran anyway. I hit the pavement. I knocked on tens of thousands of doors.
**I am working to make life better for South Florida families.** I want to expand affordable health care and reduce gun violence in our streets. I want to protect Medicare and preserve Social Security. I want to build up small businesses and break down barriers to education.
When you have a goal that clear, you don't let anything get in your way. Not the six primary opponents I beat in my first campaign. Not President Trump or Republicans in Congress. And not a well-funded Republican opponent.
**But the reality is I can't do it alone.** I need your help.
We can outwork the opposition. We can win this election with room to spare. [_**But first, we have to reach our April goal of $25,000 by midnight. So if you can, give $5 or more to help us out here.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc3/622b7b5b/1a674e2a/307b8770/2494227572/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180429?refcode=dwse180429_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
Thank you.
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc3/622b7b5b/1a674e2a/307b8773/2494227572/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: ICYMI: Buttigieg Puts National Ambition Ahead of South Bend Women in Vetoing Women’s Health Center
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Following Mayor Pete Buttigieg's politically-motivated decision this weekend to restrict health care options for women in South Bend, Indiana... | | | Friends,

Following Mayor Pete Buttigieg's [politically-motivated decision](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=62d4427055&e=1acd9bb3d6) to restrict health care options for women in South Bend, we wanted to make sure you saw this statement released by Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer.

He is calling on Democrat Joe Donnelly, who claims to be pro-life, to denounce this anti-woman move, and on the South Bend Common Council to override Buttigieg's veto to make sure women in the area have ample health care options.

We'll keep you updated, and let you know if the South Bend Common Council works to right this wrong for the women of South Bend, and if Democrat Donnelly is actually as pro-life as he claims to be.

Check out the full statement below!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=96206bb980&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Pete Seat, 520-990-4067, pseat@indiana.gop **Date:** April 28, 2018
**Buttigieg Puts National Ambition Ahead of South Bend Women in Vetoing Women’s Health Center**
_State GOP Calls on Donnelly to Denounce & Common Council to Override _
**INDIANAPOLIS** \- South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg on Friday made a consequential decision to deny the rezoning of a property, which was already approved by the South Bend Common Council, to allow for the opening of a Women’s Health Center that provides an alternative to abortion. Indiana Republican Party State Chairman Kyle Hupfer issued this statement in response: **“This is yet another example of Pete Buttigieg putting his national ambition ahead of what’s best for South Bend residents. And what’s worse is that this time he is specifically targeting women with his politically motivated decision making. ** **“By vetoing the Common Council’s re-zoning to allow for the opening of a Women’s Care Center, Buttigieg is denying underprivileged women on the west side of South Bend with the options and care they need when they don’t know where else to turn. This is a new low in his quest for national power. ** **“We call on Senator Joe Donnelly to put his convictions where his mouth is and denounce Buttigieg’s anti-woman decision. We also encourage the Common Council to immediately take up a vote to override this veto and give the women of South Bend what they deserve.” ** **###**
---

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Not a copy machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I'm going to get straight to the point: I'm asking you to give our campaign a few bucks before the clock strikes midnight tonight. |
---

| | Peter,

I'm going to get straight to the point: **[I'm asking you to give our campaign a few bucks before the clock strikes midnight tonight.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f3d/1858239409/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.1nd&amount=10")**

Now for why I'm asking: In just a few days, Republicans will choose who's going to run against me. All three of the guys they're considering seem to think the goal of a U.S. Senator is to do nothing except exactly what President Trump wants -- and if Hoosiers think the president is wrong even once, too bad for them.

But I don't think it's a senator's job to just be a copy machine for the president, or anyone else. No, the job of a U.S. Senator from Indiana is to think through the issues and do what's right for Hoosiers, and no one else.

**But if we don't find 276 more new donors before tonight 's end-of-month deadline, Indiana could get stuck with a copy machine for a senator. Can you make a donation to keep that from happening?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f3c/1858239409/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.1nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f3f/1858239409/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f3e/1858239409/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f39/1858239409/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.1nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f38/1858239409/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.1nd")****
Look, I know I'm in a tough race. President Trump and Vice President Pence have said **they 'll campaign against me like we wouldn't believe because I voted against Mitch McConnell's disastrous tax bill**. That's ok. I'm not beholden to them, or to any politician or political party. The only people I work for are Hoosiers.

I'm going to keep fighting tooth and nail to do right by you -- voting to protect health care, to protect Social Security, and against McConnell's deficit-spiking, disastrous tax law.

But things are about to get even tougher. After the Republican primary, the attacks are going to come harder than ever. **The only way we can pull out a win in November is if _everyone_ on this team steps up _now_.**

**So I 'm asking: [Can you donate just a couple dollars before tonight's final deadline before the primary?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f3d/1858239409/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.1nd&amount=10") It would mean so much to me, and do so much for the future of our state.**

Thank you for all you do,

Joe

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f3b/1858239409/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.1nd&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20aa/7377f838/3ed9cd1f/51f94f3a/1858239409/VEsP/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
As a veteran Marine officer, I believe America’s military and our laws must be feared by our enemies and respected by our allies. We have to have... | | |
---|---|---
|
---
**[>> I support the Trump-Pence plan to Make America SAFER and secure our borders – Watch this week’s video here <<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a5a31179e20d4bbeb9dab67353388b7f&_e=WAMNo5klDSq6bVeZB2FV5UYzJ0BBukHJlJJuwDAxeyLYOt_D4WB9ZyU2DEpDTFY66u36Ri_1y7Y_pDvkJBU2keWdRKFB-DqQAKQWdh1ytI-vIiOP70FgEa6Ikgq7g2VG3GjV5EVyhBUTBusVaRajuO_EoWdkGF9r0y3clhCNQ9adZsOt1-j_RbSOtW1rhUYZchbsccWsUwZv5R6fVp7zT9kdu448APsTpfWBMz3blQJkqgmwNI8hXYYUmbuBSq_YB7YjcJwWeub9_SQRWdEpUP58mk4E8EmR-JQHz6DIO0trb1gq1aBozcqm5bmJEFpBN_prefb_RKEytAyHWfSnfYRT-50ggZolrg8UJ-Q0-KutbVnHtwna8zRWKeJLt4CMMfceR8v8e5LsGx3ICzI_ujBAQZ2rLppguW88WbenMAkyDYD62KwaR0k-eNcSXa7Y)**

As a veteran Marine officer, I believe America’s military and our laws must be feared by our enemies and respected by our allies.

**We have to have immigration reform – and that starts with a border wall.**

In my mind, this is really simple – securing our borders here in America is just like locking our doors at night. We need to build the wall and prevent the flow of illegal drugs, illegal immigrants and those who pose a danger to our country.

In this week’s video, I discuss my support for a just, compassionate and legal solution for immigration reform with my friend and award-winning radio broadcaster, Greg Garrison.

**[>> We MUST secure our borders. Watch this week’s new video now <<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a5a31179e20d4bbeb9dab67353388b7f&_e=WAMNo5klDSq6bVeZB2FV5UYzJ0BBukHJlJJuwDAxeyLYOt_D4WB9ZyU2DEpDTFY66u36Ri_1y7Y_pDvkJBU2keWdRKFB-DqQAKQWdh1ytI-vIiOP70FgEa6Ikgq7g2VG3GjV5EVyhBUTBusVaRajuO_EoWdkGF9r0y3clhCNQ9adZsOt1-j_RbSOtW1rhUYZchbsccWsUwZv5R6fVp7zT9kdu448APsTpfWBMz3blQIxsVLgjjekNdO_Uh08l28PAjGIoZ-8_3Sozid_WbO7px57LUuiYerjhQMnFYjUBabbR7KTgb10grk5nYYRywKxbkfxBE8FBkPrLrhgYiszTamQ-pt0dw3fx5jlCNFnv3Ow_hSd4kL9-QsdvDwwjC0frXOSm55YjX1vj5AhlebzMbpcWeEO3cpDwa8SWdkh6x3Z3RrLf5FQ4ujvsD-aPnxZ)**

[ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a5a31179e20d4bbeb9dab67353388b7f&_e=WAMNo5klDSq6bVeZB2FV5UYzJ0BBukHJlJJuwDAxeyLYOt_D4WB9ZyU2DEpDTFY66u36Ri_1y7Y_pDvkJBU2keWdRKFB-DqQAKQWdh1ytI-vIiOP70FgEa6Ikgq7g2VG3GjV5EVyhBUTBusVaRajuO_EoWdkGF9r0y3clhCNQ9adZsOt1-j_RbSOtW1rhUYZchbsccWsUwZv5R6fVp7zT9kdu448APsTpfWBMz3blQKuV7szbg7JrvtFNtL8_Qg6sqO2z4P2S5qOyudCWlY3r5fF2LwQbjS5KdNtj6H1oBpSAchE3RBps7zzd4RkkeR86VM7-5USg7wYcDOplCoV-F2-47zpHin4l3PTC6Ng8VB5YXWSdjfwC2y9vdNoFZVESP0mwaDQNSFOXbZT5TZj-7VE0OQwYLpwL8NOz6-qlo412UqHW3ihgJjj4XaxL_VF)
[ **Watch the Video** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a5a31179e20d4bbeb9dab67353388b7f&_e=WAMNo5klDSq6bVeZB2FV5UYzJ0BBukHJlJJuwDAxeyLYOt_D4WB9ZyU2DEpDTFY66u36Ri_1y7Y_pDvkJBU2keWdRKFB-DqQAKQWdh1ytI-vIiOP70FgEa6Ikgq7g2VG3GjV5EVyhBUTBusVaRajuO_EoWdkGF9r0y3clhCNQ9adZsOt1-j_RbSOtW1rhUYZchbsccWsUwZv5R6fVp7zT9kdu448APsTpfWBMz3blQLrHMMOI3U4Is-LPnlZkyZZJPebJDjSx4-Gnczx4f6AfvtaH9CKDpEkbwzKkVeyjodidEVLDe1L59Ul--nKXXoF57-h07_vSZDucLSmjPHoZpRPf8mRLAlDjXYaiLPxscK2kGx3MjC4K0VzKAxd5JZLyQxg5yU1Q-InSCYI92UIGZf2gZWicYW9HPreIFaqBeoYyS094e5hSEqUfU57FKEe)
**President Trump is fighting to secure our borders. I want to help the Trump/Pence administration make our communities safer.**

As the grandson of an Irish immigrant, I respect and understand the need for people of all backgrounds in this great nation - after all, America is a country of immigrants. BUT, we must create a lawful system for **everyone** to follow.

**From Day One, I will make it a priority in Congress to fight alongside the Trump/Pence administration to find a just, compassionate and legal solution to our immigration problem.**

**[There’s only 1 week until the May 8 Primary. Join Team Pence to help President Trump& Vice President Pence Make America Safer >>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a5a31179e20d4bbeb9dab67353388b7f&_e=WAMNo5klDSq6bVeZB2FV5QSFkyhzioSqWPZV85NHXDsvS7ak0fK255p-0H-0dg7_2Zj5rEa3UnywPLG2piYQOmX4p97eVUmTHCeESIMZWC2tpba_uSCwtUUIcwb7UpO_UjFgSJ7Za0Pfk_tGSbe2Qjyre4xQS4120Bp8jP7RvWfC7-iUUFNdnovw3izV3aH8efKfEQ4cOgdqBEQLtfqB2SSbhlNgrYC_tIdTkWAJCSWvaS1DD2oK3K1I23bnNIilrll_7xwcP0VMLwU7m6KhNIAPOJqNRNY9VcBWGDuQzqgh6SIfp6gZVrHeQZbEUfkzAuLNSmX2HYxhfJFwhH6N93ljsGgzQFVY5NHWrQgaUsJG3-mw6XT454hmdnURnWCk4O3WxBvthVuMIUCd_1JvpeK6HNYJYRvHs1BG9cQQmXg%3D)**

I'm Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg

name: Team Inslee
subject: The difference with progressives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Net neutrality and beyond -- what progressive leadership can accomplish: | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bc8/2f5ea88d/71dda750/2cbca0d4/4213375749/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&utm_campaign=eom-4-nn&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **With Jay in the lead, Washington state passed the first law in the nation protecting net neutrality.** It was exactly the bold action Congress should have taken, but they failed to step up. Rather than moving quickly to preserve a free and open internet, Congress caved to the dictates of the Trump-run FCC. Jay and the state legislature refused to accept the do-nothing stance of Congress. Working together, Jay and legislators from both sides of the aisle forged a solution. They did what was right for Washingtonians -- and led by example. [**Will you help Jay show Donald Trump and Congress what is being accomplished by progressive leaders ready, willing, and able to take action? Our goal is $20,000 in the door before midnight tonight.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bc8/2f5ea88d/71dda750/2cbca0d4/4213375749/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&utm_campaign=eom-4-nn&utm_medium=ema") While Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans are spending their days squabbling or attacking our shared values, progressive leaders like Jay are getting down to work -- and getting things done. As the Trump administration tries to stifle innovation and tear down our digital economy, Jay and other progressive leaders are fighting back. They know our future depends on a free exchange of ideas, a willingness to experiment, and a commitment to share knowledge. In the era of Trump, Washington state under Jay's leadership is setting the standard for bold progressive action achieving real results. [**Can you donate right now to help Jay show others what can be accomplished by progressive leaders taking action?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bc8/2f5ea88d/71dda750/2cbca0d4/4213375749/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&utm_campaign=eom-4-nn&utm_medium=ema") Thanks for standing with Jay. Team Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bc8/2f5ea88d/71dda750/2cbca0d4/4213375749/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-4-nn&utm_campaign=eom-4-nn&utm_medium=ema")

Friend,

We're less than 12 hours away from our last end of month deadline before the convention and Leah is really counting on you to help us succeed.

**We're just $6,031 shy of our $25,000 goal and we don’t want to let Leah down. Can you help?**

[EMERGENCY CHIP IN >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=622bc8f6a733491b8323fc2d391dde84&_e=UD6p4z9zchXyMzVKqbuM3ZEXiE2mNPB2qqjnrc2TK8LD5OxibC4R3T_dJ2djWfFk8fZOmkOv-wdcNPESMdp_Hpgt98C_NGiCME4QY3efgdENqAi_EZz6s70zyO84KIt_lj9FJkur2nVbmCGlohrsrv-rqebv2UtF95JLgFG1C5nuXqJyQYFiPY3w5j9Ov8elm77AuW244_LELYBrtegOzJQs85zAve2jhsmCY6cpEIu5k5wfBbpRc0aSnnBWczpMP1l-flJYCHqWyJt4wde_MBIeusFRkwZoeCcZ0-7LiJwI2LbCZV-_mNGyndJqStYGZI6m7sUasvogzmd2O3-mQN-qGoubhDjn6_VV3oh5udb2RrMIVSm429nC-O1dhlH0pkkgAbi-hq9hMmuG0i4iHTtgAdkhBCFv48P6T5c_Bwk%3D)

Every donation made will help us to victory at the convention... and in November.

We need you more now than ever before.

Please, chip in as soon as you can: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=622bc8f6a733491b8323fc2d391dde84&_e=UD6p4z9zchXyMzVKqbuM3ZEXiE2mNPB2qqjnrc2TK8LD5OxibC4R3T_dJ2djWfFk8fZOmkOv-wdcNPESMdp_Hpgt98C_NGiCME4QY3efgdENqAi_EZz6s70zyO84KIt_lj9FJkur2nVbmCGlohrsrv-rqebv2UtF95JLgFG1C5nuXqJyQYFiPY3w5j9Ov8elNMjpjtbOEpARiEjvFV4UeJe6qmyhPYvKkeO4gazEFm2PvJA24UeUptOTNMBTJ8VMku1HFLD6W3R3HT6EPb_pwz11a8gCO0AYWIttn5Jb59X52bw7vPmDdyVb6l9OrQepmrFcghsznM6JPA09Ef3O1xK0C1CXlCS3PLe-hRFNgoldRJBJWjFB1I5-Hl3IaWuvcZklJQ6f8IslujkPJ842UHsGEmSDOvzAVKVkpB_6n0E%3D)**

Time is running out.

Team Leah

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend, I can't even believe this... we're facing our last end of month deadline before our convention in May.

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=622bc8f6a733491b8323fc2d391dde84&_e=UD6p4z9zchXyMzVKqbuM3S8aDWWUtUtEOGV0FhVy41-BvufpfyXopPQh5fz5ZegoqGzQNmljn4KjU7s4AInO9NRVPB0i2FafjcIVqDOWLkn7d2uU_kRnh5Yd42WncpHgxt4Zp-2W98NDV8E3aB7WS1aA5bzgzB7QLS5YrqkcwcifhpulvWnIfrEvLgL-CG18_9X5Dvstn9ebDvBMkric7f0XXBFdXMFDHeA-zrP1PerI69qg3S3UOZD1EB0H23lFJsRyzxXH5XV5iEbYD9jaDUTH1GZ8JefLVB_ah7hoGYAsKBx_aIgffcn0C46nbsOiM4zCFys__3CeZThOstGLRiI_uK6AT4wwMZ-uL03L2vHwXRmuKBqbUujwV-O_LQGO) that you care about? We're just $6,031 shy of our $25,000 goal and we don’t want to let Leah down. Can you help? Every donation made will help us to victory at the convention... and in November. We need you more now than ever before. Please, chip in as soon as you can: Time is running out. But we have to start NOW. Friend, I know you and I both have had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative, Wisconsin-style change. We can do it, as long as we don't fall behind now. We need this $25,000 before our deadline. name: Keith Ellison
subject: You haven't donated yet this year. Can you contribute before tonight's deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
We can't let up -- not even for a second -- especially not when Democrats face a major fundraising deadline tonight at midnight.
---
I'm fired up, Derek.

The DNC has officially hit our grassroots fundraising goal of 70,000 individual donations for April. Supporters like you continue to step up to support this party -- and the more our party is funded by the grassroots, the stronger we are.

But we can't let up -- not even for a second. That's why we've officially raised our goal to 75,000 individual donations for the month -- meaning we only need 2,003 more before our major fundraising deadline tonight at midnight.

**I'm asking you, Derek: Chip in your first $3 donation of 2018 before tonight's critical fundraising deadline to help us hit our new goal -- allowing us to support even more candidates and campaigns across the country.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522826/4067b0a/587ee88fe/7e458304/3382849873/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ke_nd&source=em_20180430_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180430_ke_nd")

If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522826/4067b0a/587ee88fe/7e45830f/3382849873/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ke_nd&source=em_20180430_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180430_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522826/4067b0a/587ee88fe/7e45830c/3382849873/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ke_nd&source=em_20180430_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180430_ke_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522826/4067b0a/587ee88fe/7e45830d/3382849873/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ke_nd&source=em_20180430_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180430_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522826/4067b0a/587ee88fe/7e45830a/3382849873/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180430_ke_nd&source=em_20180430_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180430_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: We can't let up -- not even for a second -- especially not when Democrats face a major fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. I'm fired up, Derek. The DNC has officially hit our grassroots fundraising goal of 70,000 individual donations for April. Supporters like you continue to step up to support this party -- and the more our party is funded by the grassroots, the stronger we are. But we can't let up -- not even for a second. That's why we've officially raised our goal to 75,000 individual donations for the month -- meaning we only need 2,003 more before our major fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. I'm asking you, Derek: Chip in your first $3 donation of 2018 before tonight's critical fundraising deadline to help us hit our new goal -- allowing us to support even more candidates and campaigns across the country. "" "" "" "" "" "" In solidarity, Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee P.S. -- Democrats are winning in red districts across the country, out-hustling the GOP on the ground, getting out our message that we are the party of working people -- AND crushing our fundraising goals. "" Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: It's about time

| | We all want the same things for our families: health care, stable incomes from purposeful employment, access to quality education. Republicans are approaching these goals in the wrong way. They've accepted money from special interest groups like the NRA, and continue to insist that the problem with gun violence is a lack of good guys with guns. We will not have safer communities by turning them into war zones. As a nation, we've observed too many instances where easy access to guns has devastating consequences. Tighter regulations are well overdue. The fear mongering we see from Republicans is not leadership. If we're going to stop gun violence in this country, we need to ban together. Our April fundraising deadline is midnight tonight and we're just 44 grassroots contributions away from our goal. [_**Chip in before midnight and we can continue to move a real agenda forward--free from the influence of special interests.**_](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc04651/7da2b91d/5cf42a17/5c677e92/2986293039/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?refcode=2018-04-30-2018-04eom2&recurring=1&amount=3") I'm energized by the students leading this movement, but I am furious that we've allowed this to become their problem. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: The deadline we face tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The deadline we face tonight is a big test for this team. So before midnight, I'm counting on you to make one of the final 129 contributions we need to hit our goal.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20180430-Schumer-V1-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team --

The deadline we face tonight is a big test for this team.

We've stopped GOP attempts to repeal Obamacare. We've stood united against the GOP tax scam.

Now, we've seen how far President Trump is willing to go to take down Democratic Senators who put their constituents first.

And we understand how important it is for grassroots Democrats to stand together in this fight.

[**So before midnight, I'm counting on you to make one of the final 129 contributions we need to hit our goal.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20180430-Schumer-V1-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Tonight is about sending a message to the president and his Republican allies.

If we can hit our goal, we'll show that we're fully engaged in the fight to not only defend our Senate Democrats, but take back the Senate. And we can use those resources to build the program it will take to drive voter turnout -- to win big on Election Day.

**So please, make one of the final donations we need to hit our goal and show that we 're all standing together in this fight. Any dollar you donate will be triple-matched:**

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?amount=15&refcode=DPE-20180430-Schumer-V1-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?amount=25&refcode=DPE-20180430-Schumer-V1-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?amount=35&refcode=DPE-20180430-Schumer-V1-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20180430-Schumer-V1-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Chuck

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954c8e4/2b07114c/176723a3e/73003f42/2757050581/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954c8e4/2b07114c/176723a3e/73003fbd/2757050581/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954c8e4/2b07114c/176723a3e/73003fbc/2757050581/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: staff@joeforindiana.com
subject: one question... (ok, maybe two)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
In less than two weeks, money will start flowing to one of those guys at an unprecedented rate -- all so he can defeat Joe and do whatever his wealthy campaign donors ask. |
---

| | | "Do you want a copy machine who simply does whatever President Trump tells him to do, or do you want somebody who thinks through the issues?" -- Joe Donnelly
---

**Peter, every one of the guys running against Joe has made it clear that he's more interested in serving as a rubber stamp for President Trump than he's interested in serving Hoosiers.**

In less than two weeks, money will start flowing to one of those guys at an unprecedented rate -- all so he can defeat Joe and do whatever his wealthy campaign donors ask.

It all comes down to this: **If you want Indiana to send a senator back to Washington who will _fight for Hoosiers,_ now is the time to step up.** We're only a few hours away from our end-of-April deadline. Joe's already told you why this one is so important, and now the ball's in your court.

[**We 're _so close_ to hitting our goal -- will you pitch in before midnight to help us get there? >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f94821/2376713106/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=10")

Thanks,
Team Donnelly
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Joe Donnelly**
Subject: not a copy machine

Team,

I'm going to get straight to the point: **[I'm asking you to give our campaign a few bucks before the clock strikes midnight tonight.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f94821/2376713106/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=10")**

Now for why I'm asking: In just a few days, Republicans will choose who's going to run against me. All three of the guys they're considering seem to think the goal of a U.S. Senator is to do nothing except exactly what President Trump wants -- and if Hoosiers think the president is wrong even once, too bad for them.

But I don't think it's a senator's job to just be a copy machine for the president, or anyone else. No, the job of a U.S. Senator from Indiana is to think through the issues and do what's right for Hoosiers, and no one else.

**But if we don't find 276 more new donors before tonight 's end-of-month deadline, Indiana could get stuck with a copy machine for a senator. Can you make a donation to keep that from happening?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f94820/2376713106/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f94823/2376713106/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f94822/2376713106/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f9481d/2376713106/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?express_lane=true&refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f9481c/2376713106/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.2nd")****
Look, I know I'm in a tough race. President Trump and Vice President Pence have said **they 'll campaign against me like we wouldn't believe because I voted against Mitch McConnell's disastrous tax bill**. That's ok. I'm not beholden to them, or to any politician or political party. The only people I work for are Hoosiers.

I'm going to keep fighting tooth and nail to do right by you -- voting to protect health care, to protect Social Security, and against McConnell's deficit-spiking, disastrous tax law.

But things are about to get even tougher. After the Republican primary, the attacks are going to come harder than ever. **The only way we can pull out a win in November is if _everyone_ on this team steps up _now_.**

**So I 'm asking: [Can you donate just a couple dollars before tonight's final deadline before the primary?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f94821/2376713106/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=10") It would mean so much to me, and do so much for the future of our state.**

Thank you for all you do,

Joe

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f9481f/2376713106/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180430.2nd&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b6/7377f838/3ed33f69/51f9481e/2376713106/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")
