body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12034f0/2fde7c66/4675f0de/1569c03a/3640103127/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180427-cooper-apr18eom?gpsid=14_43_147&refcode=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")

Hello,

I wanted to catch up with you quickly before tonight's fundraising deadline.

We just got the latest numbers in from Caroline, who's in charge of keeping us on our budgets -- we're closing strong but we still have $4,819 to raise before midnight to hit our goal.

**This November is our best chance to break the Republican supermajority, but that won't be possible if we don't have the money. Can I count on you to chip in before our midnight deadline?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12034f0/2fde7c66/4675f0de/1569c03d/3640103127/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180427-cooper-apr18eom?gpsid=14_43_147&refcode=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=2+-++ask++raquo")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12034f0/2fde7c66/4675f0de/1569c03c/3640103127/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJNaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180427-cooper-apr18eom?gpsid=14_43_147&refcode=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_content=3+-++ask2++raquo")

---
North Carolinians are sick and tired of legislators who are more interested in playing politics than moving North Carolina forward.

November's election is about more than politics -- it's about making a big difference in North Carolina's future.

[**We have the opportunity to do something special. Let's not let this moment pass us by. Chip in before midnight if you can.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12034f0/2fde7c66/4675f0de/1569c031/3640103127/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180427-cooper-apr18eom?gpsid=14_43_147&refcode=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180430_apreom5_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+We+have+the+opportunity+to+do+something+")

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy

Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

dpwillis67@gmail.com

clean_body: | "" Hello, I wanted to catch up with you quickly before tonight's fundraising deadline. We just got the latest numbers in from Caroline, who's in charge of keeping us on our budgets -- we're closing strong but we still have $4,819 to raise before midnight to hit our goal. This November is our best chance to break the Republican supermajority, but that won't be possible if we don't have the money. Can I count on you to chip in before our midnight deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" North Carolinians are sick and tired of legislators who are more interested in playing politics than moving North Carolina forward. November's election is about more than politics -- it's about making a big difference in North Carolina's future. "+" Thanks for all you continue to do, Roy * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

body:

Wanted to send you this quick update - our _**early bird pricing of $100 ends tonight at midnight!**_

On Monday, May 14th we are going to hear from **_Betsy DeVos_** \- and you won't want to miss it!

Hey Derek,

It's true, spring has finally arrived!

But the warmer weather also means that our **[2 nd Annual "Spring to Victory" Dinner]( https://secure.anedot.com/new-hampshire-republican-state-committee/2018-spring-to-victory)** is right around the corner.

I am pleased to announce that the Honorable Betsy DeVos will be joining us as our keynote speaker for this year's dinner on Monday, May 14th in Atkinson, NH!
[ ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSC7OoaiBI5Vexeq2N0YNbu6fJYtbKr5CYf1qVT8V0vU4B7XyIaabq3Pr-2BbzA1UPxEw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M6dWNxcVc3j7zDoXENUlmCndEz0vHImcVbkya6Bh7kq3mX-2BP3CIdadyi-2BxamxVBn9f30RAY0Z6NTOyihrRDCoDFAdIIgXutVUWkDLQnmp8MQZjNH4sDwQvfYIUuasWe-2F9FwAq0R4jNp-2BYw4caQHDy0lbfjcbp6Tuvo9YXMJP1f-2FBtEMPKKkQFN0HerEVxlKwlCaK0fgmxYEmnrdQSQ2A4V74rdaCv-2FCpSpyAy1-2FQiX0gd-2FFjRUupvDmCCC7HprMLKZ8pOpvOTDl7tWWbMWZnT9A-3D-3D)

We are well on our way to victory in November and the funds from this event will be poured right into our ground operation.

[**Our early bird special of $100 per person starts today. It won't last long, so be sure to purchase right now****!**]( https://secure.anedot.com/new-hampshire-republican-state-committee/2018-spring-to-victory)

clean_body: Derek, Wanted to send you this quick update - our early bird pricing of $100 ends tonight at midnight! On Monday, May 14th we are going to hear from Betsy DeVos \- and you won't want to miss it! Go to TODAY and get your ticket. We're going to have a stellar time on May 14th - Sincerely, Todd CheewingNHGOP Executive Director | | Hey Derek, It's true, spring has finally arrived! But the warmer weather also means that our is right around the corner. I am pleased to announce that the Honorable Betsy DeVos will be joining us as our keynote speaker for this year's dinner on Monday, May 14th in Atkinson, NH! We are well on our way to victory in November and the funds from this event will be poured right into our ground operation. | Event Details: Spring to Victory Dinner Monday, May 14th 5:30PM - Cocktails & VIP 6:30PM - Dinner Atkinson Country Club 85 Country Club Drive Atkinson, NH 03811 For sponsorship information or questions, please visit our event page here: | Thank you for all that you do. I look forward to seeing you on May 14th! Sincerely, Jeanie Forrester Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

body:
|
---
| Hi there -- My finance team just briefed me, and we're only $1,190 away from our first FEC deadline since Rick Scott announced he's running for Senate. We have got to make it count.

I've copied the link you can give at below, and I'll be updated once we receive your gift. Please contribute what you can to help put us over the top.

[**http://act.floridadems.org/april-fec-deadline-stop-scott-fund**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-rick-scott-fec-deadline?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+httpactfloridademsorgaprilfecdeadlinesto&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180430_3_8&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180430_3_8&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180430_3_8")

Thank you.
Terrie

name: Finance Update
subject: We have to pull it together, and fast
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Debbie has seven opponents. We can't be caught unprepared. **And right now, we are about $1,211 behind the $25,000 we need this month.** Debbie has an advantage her opponents don't have: **YOU.** | | | [Contribute](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc0/622b7b5b/1a9c5b13/307b8699/726343372/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNDI5cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180429pm?refcode=dwse180429pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
We all know who Debbie is and what she stands for. Everything she does, she does for the good of South Florida families.
Her opponents will resort to name-calling and smears. It's all they can do, really. We need to make sure we're ready to fight against whatever attacks come hurtling our way.
[_**Can you give $5, $10, or more toward our $25,000 April goal before tonight's midnight deadline?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fc0/622b7b5b/1a9c5b13/307b8699/726343372/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNDI5cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180429pm?refcode=dwse180429pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
